markdownRemark.html: I was able to surf again. The timing was perfect. The waves were small so I felt comfortable getting warmed up again. Aside from surfing, I built my 1st full Ember application. I’ve been working in Ember for a while but I had not built a full application—until now!

frontmatter.meta: Week 35, I got back to surfing after a few weeks off and built my first full Ember Application
frontmatter.title: Week 35, Surfing again and building my first full Ember Application
